hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(i.tool_input?.command||'');if(/git\s+push/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] WARNING: About to run: '+cmd.trim());console.error('[Hook] Confirm this push is intentional before proceeding.')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Warn before git push to prevent accidental pushes

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(md|txt)$/.test(p)&&!/(README|CLAUDE|AGENTS|CONTRIBUTING|SKILL)\.md$/.test(p)){console.error('[Hook] WARNING: Creating documentation file: '+p);console.error('[Hook] Consider consolidating docs in README.md or CLAUDE.md')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Warn about creating random .md files - keeps docs consolidated
Suggest manual compaction at logical intervals

SessionStart.description: Load previous context on new session
